notes: Defined withTaskLock in src/control-plane/actions.js using the task-${projectId}-${taskName} lock naming used by the existing run lifecycle lock path.
Global stop, force-stop, and restart in src/cli.js now call stopManagedRun or restartManagedRun directly and allow action-layer errors to surface through normal CLI error handling.
Removed the CLI ReferenceError fallback path and fallback-only helpers from src/cli.js.
Preserved restart timeout state/event behavior inside restartManagedRun so future clients share the same action-layer control-plane behavior.
recovery_hints: If restart timeout behavior regresses, inspect stopOwnedRunForRestart and markRestartPortReleaseTimeout in src/control-plane/actions.js rather than adding CLI fallbacks.
If lock contention appears, compare lock files under the control-plane locks directory for project-${projectId} and task-${projectId}-${taskName} names.
